prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to regulatory changes and standards for social housing, which falls under the jurisdiction of England. It addresses landlords such as local authorities and housing associations that operate within England, making it applicable for English social housing regulation.
